title: tournefortia candollei
intro: Tournefortia candollei, also known as the Candolle's Tournefortia or Tournefortia, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is a shrub native to Central and South America, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Tournefortia candollei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections.
